name: Bombirdier
description: The Item Drop Pokémon. It gathers things up in an apron made from shed feathers added to the Pokémon’s chest feathers, then drops those things from high places for fun.

abilities.name: Big Pecks
abilities.description: This Pokémon's AC cannot be reduced by an opponent's moves.

abilities.name: Keen Eye
abilities.description: This Pokémon ignores disadvantage when it relates to sight.

abilities.name: Rocky Payload
abilities.description: When this Pokémon uses a rock-type move, it may roll the damage twice and choose either total.
